title: Holo music
description:
Change out the music discs with hololive songs. 

Disclaimer: I do not own any of these songs, all rights are held by the original creators
body:
Disclaimer: I do not own any of these songs, all rights are held by the original creators 

Music discs that get changed in V1: 
1. 13: [Prism no Mahou](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M3pjFfKBonI), by: Koseki Bijou,
2. Cat: [Smile & Go!!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G4PT1phuM9M), by: Shiranui Flare,
3. Blocks: [Midnight Mayoi](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Du4unKMbR2Q), by: Mori Calliope/Kobo Kanaeru,
4. Chirp: [Midnight Mission](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h0JrFYBqgEU), by: midnight grand orchestra
5. Creator: [Stellar Stellar](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a51VH9BYzZA), by: Hoshimachi Suisei,
6. Creator (music box): [Stellar Stellar (First Take Ver.)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AAsRtnbDs-0), by: Hoshimachi Suisei (On First take Channel),
7. Far: [I'm Your Treasure Box](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vV-5W7SFHDc), by: Houshou Marine.
8. Mall: [Q](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aetXqd9B8WE), by: Mori Caillope/Gawr Gura/Deco*27 
9. Mellohi:[Born to be "BAU"DOL](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aThUfmKQgaY), by: FuwaMoco,
10. Stal : [Doggy god's street](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wLNTAMY1NZA), by: Inugami Korone
11. Strad: [What an amazing swing](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d3UTywBDSW4), by: Tsunomaki Watame
12. Ward: [Odyssey](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0wO8d70KSXw), by: Hololive English (On Mori Calliope Channel)
13. 11: [turing love Cover](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hX_3P0TBGP4), by: Cecilia Immergreen/Gigi Murin
14. Wait: [Wicked](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=88QKF3yuiyI), by: Hoshimachi Suisei/Mori Calliope
15. Otherside: [PLAY DICE!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=na6bysYNuS0), by: Hakos Baelz,
16. Relic: [ClubBlueFire](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GtHXTvU-Ik0), by: Hiodoshi Ao
17. 5: [Overdose Cover](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iiw9Z1I1AcE), by: Kobo Kanaeru, 
18. Pigstep: [Bunny Girl Cover](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f7PhrnJWuuY), by: Shirakami Fubuki/Nekomata Okayu
19. Precipice: [Carbonated Love](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DjNNpw2x2dU), by: IRyS
